cad_masters.notes: Parametric body-envelope starter for the G4 prototype tube; renders clean in OpenSCAD. Not a final production mold or measured acoustic validation. Embouchure/voicing out of scope.
Physics starter; source-only (not executed). L2 evidence.
Parametric workbook; current planning authority (first-pass fired targets, master scaling, tone-hole schedules, DoE). Measurement-gated until Round 1 firing.

notes: OpenSCAD source + design workbook are the current masters; no STEP export yet (SolidWorks export is Windows-side, out of scope for this intake pass). Design is unvalidated/experimental. Gate A (Alpha workspace compile) not yet run.
